intro.text: My fleet can tow debris fields, but we need reef anchors restored or currents will keep pulling plastics back in.

options.text: I will reinforce the coral lattice sites.
How are storms affecting your routes?

reef_ops.text: Place reef cores along the shelf edge. Healthy coral slows wave energy and traps fewer synthetic particles.

options.text: I will lock in the shelf perimeter.

storm_ops.text: Storm cells are stronger every season. If your climate index rises, we can keep vessels in water longer.

options.text: Then climate stabilization is now part of every run.

end.text: You keep the coast alive, we keep the sea lanes clear.
